title: An Act to Prohibit Fluoridation of the Public Water Supply
final_disposition: Ought Not to Pass Pursuant To Joint Rule 310, May 14, 2025
last_house_action: 4/10/2025 - Committee on Health and Human Services suggested and ordered printed. The Bill was REFERRED to the Committee on HEALTH AND HUMAN SERVICES . Sent for concurrence. ORDERED SENT FORTHWITH.
last_senate_action: 5/14/2025 - Pursuant to Joint Rule 310.3 Placed in Legislative Files (DEAD)
